text: How much money do I have in my account?
response: Your current available balance is shown in the app dashboard.

text: Show me my account balance
response: You can check your balance instantly from the Accounts tab.

text: What is my remaining balance after today's purchases?
response: I can help with that. Please open the latest account summary section.

text: I lost my card, please block it now
response: I have initiated a card block request. Please confirm in security settings.

text: Block my debit card immediately
response: Your card can be blocked from the Cards menu for safety.

text: Someone stole my ATM card
response: For your protection, please freeze the card right away from the app.

text: Where is my transfer?
response: You can track transfer progress in transaction history.

text: My payment is pending
response: Pending transactions are usually completed within one business day.

text: Did my transaction go through?
response: Please open the transaction detail page to see the latest status.

text: I want to apply for a personal loan
response: You can check loan offers and eligibility in the Loans section.

text: Tell me your loan interest rates
response: Loan interest rates depend on product type and risk profile.

text: How long does loan approval take?
response: Most personal loan applications are reviewed within 24 to 72 hours.

text: I think this charge is fraud
response: Please report the transaction immediately so our team can investigate.

text: There is an unknown transaction on my account
response: We can help file a fraud claim. Open the transaction and choose Report issue.

text: My account was charged without my permission
response: I recommend locking your card and starting a fraud dispute now.

text: Can I pay my electricity bill from this app?
response: Yes, bill payments are available under Payments and Bills.

text: How do I schedule monthly bill payments?
response: You can create automatic recurring bill payments from the bill details page.

text: Is there a fee for paying utility bills?
response: Some billers may include convenience fees. Check before confirming payment.

text: I want to open a new savings account
response: You can open a savings account online by completing eKYC verification.

text: What documents are needed to open an account?
response: Usually you need a valid ID and proof of address.

text: Can foreigners open an account with your bank?
response: Eligibility may vary by region. Please review account opening requirements in app.
